name: C-5 --enforce exits two when the verifier-output verdict is not in concur/diverge/abstain per the schema
command: printf '{"pr_sha":"abc123","verdict":"unknown"}' > v.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/sod-gate.sh" --enforce --pr-sha abc123 --verifier-output v.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'verdict' err.txt && echo rejected 1>&2
